name: Data Backup Chip
effect: Once as a Basic Action, apply this chip to your partner Digimon. Until the end of the current encounter if your partner Digimon would have their Default Stage reduced, the reduction is delayed by one round — the cascade triggers at the start of their next turn instead of immediately. The chip crumbles after use.
notes: Delays Default Stage reduction by 1 round. Single use. Partner Digimon only.
